```{r prep packages}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)

source("./prius2/scripts/helper_functions.R")
```

```{r prep memory}
# rm(list = ls())
rm(list = setdiff(ls(), c("read_species_list")))
```

```{r}
raw <- read_excel("./prius2/temp/criterium_milieu_v26-02-06.xlsx",
                  sheet = 1)
```

```{r}
env <- raw %>% 
  select(soort,
         GBIF_code,
         marien,
         brakwater,
         zoetwater,
         terrestrisch)
```

```{r}
write_csv(env, "./prius2/temp/criterium_milieu_v26-02-06.csv")
```
